one_liner: TTD up 6% but in Wyckoff Distribution Phase C-D with 4/5 distribution signals — the bounce is a potential Last Point of Supply (LPSY); DCF shows 86% upside if the fundamental thesis holds.

news_catalyst.headline: The Trade Desk Seeing Bounce in Distribution Phase — Caution Warranted
news_catalyst.summary: TTD is up 6% today but the Wyckoff structure is concerning: the stock is in Distribution Phase C-D with 4 of 5 distribution signals detected, the highest warning level. In Wyckoff methodology, a bounce in late distribution (near the LPSY level) is often the final opportunity for smart money to distribute remaining shares to retail buyers. The DCF base case of $34 implies 86% upside — but that requires the distribution to resolve as a false signal and the programmatic advertising business to recover. VCP is also 'forming' which adds a contradictory bullish signal worth monitoring.

technical.summary: TTD is in a high-conviction Wyckoff bearish structure — Distribution Phase C-D with 4/5 signals. RSI at 38.7 and bearish MACD align. The VCP forming is a contradictory signal worth watching — if a genuine VCP breakout occurs above $24.32, it would invalidate the distribution thesis. Today's 6% bounce on only 1.26x volume is insufficient to confirm a reversal. The $17.64 support is critical — a break below would confirm full distribution and open a move toward much lower levels.

valuation.summary: DCF base case of $34 implies 86% upside — but only if the 10% growth assumption materializes. Bear case of $19.56 is close to current price ($18.37), suggesting limited downside if growth decelerates only modestly.

key_strengths: Leader in programmatic advertising demand-side platform
10% FCF growth rate — positive and growing
key_concerns: Distribution Wyckoff structure contradicts fundamental case
Ad market sensitivity to economic slowdown
fundamentals.summary: Grade B fundamentals — solid but not exceptional. The disconnect between the bearish Wyckoff structure and the 86% DCF upside creates an interesting setup. Wait for Wyckoff to resolve: if the stock reclaims $24.32 VCP pivot on strong volume, the fundamental case becomes very compelling.

risks: 4/5 Wyckoff distribution signals — highest bearish structural warning
Break below $17.64 support would confirm distribution and signal further downside
Today's bounce on moderate volume (1.26x) is insufficient to confirm trend reversal
